summary: Investing just ₹2,000 every month—an amount many people spend on leisure activities or eating out—can potentially grow into a corpus of more than ₹1 crore.

title: No Flexi Cap Fund gave 10% returns over the last 1 year: Should investors worry? Here's what experts say
summary: The best-performing flexi cap fund returned 9.91% over the past year, while only five schemes crossed the 8% mark. Experts say the muted performance reflects market conditions, not poor fund management.
